strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded
Strong TDD/craftsmanship background with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching AI agent requirement
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; heavy DLang focus in mid-career
No clear cloud platform depth (AWS mentioned briefly via CDK; GCP/Azure absent)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and shallow cloud breadth

response.justification: Candidate brings deep fullstack experience with the primary TypeScript/Node/React stack, a strong testing and craftsmanship culture, and directly relevant current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. Gaps around Nest.js specifically and broader cloud platform depth are notable but learnable given the senior profile and demonstrated polyglot adaptability.
